title: Spectral Methods
author_string: Carretero-González, R., Frantzeskakis, D.J., Kevrekidis, P.G.
abstract:
Abstract
               In this chapter we give a brief introduction to the numerical integration of nonlinear waves using spectral methods. By no means do we intend for this chapter to be comprehensive; rather, it is designed to give you a flavor of what is at the core of spectral methods. The avid reader is very much encouraged to read the beautiful book by Nick Trefethen [Lloyd N. Trefethen Spectral Methods in Matlab, (SIAM, Philadelphia, 2000)] which includes succinct Matlab codes for the different covered topics.
